_purpose: Curated list of SHARED, framework-owned harness tools that the base template distributes to every spoke. Framework (the convergence curator) decides what belongs here.
_IMPORTANT_tools_location: These files install into the SPOKE'S OWN repo-local 'tools/' directory (e.g. <spoke-root>/tools/lug_utils.py). This is NOT '~/tools/'. '~/tools/' is Basher's HOME toolbox (external CLIs like gastown/gitnexus) and is off-limits here. The repo-local 'tools/' folder is the spoke's own, version-controlled in the spoke repo. (See CLAUDE.md anti-pattern: '~/tools/ is Basher's; the repo-local tools/ is the repo's own.')
source_root: framework/tools/  (the running ozi_autopilot.py's own directory — canonical regardless of which spoke runs consolidation)

tools.why: Shared lug helpers + resolve_attribution() (canonical who/when/where attribution string). Stdlib-only; imported by the other shared tools.
Emit complete change-lugs (the curator-model contribution protocol). Imports resolve_attribution from lug_utils.

_expansion_note: Start minimal (the contribute/attribution base). The curator adds tools here as they become genuinely shared harness infrastructure — each must be import-clean for a spoke (prefer stdlib-only or list depends_on within this set).
